## What problem does this solve?

Describe the use case or pain point.

## Proposed solution

What you'd like the module to do.

## Alternatives considered

Any workarounds you're using today, or other approaches you thought about.

## Additional context

Anything else that helps — links, examples, related Power Platform / Dataverse behaviour.
